ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Distribtion To Heir Renella Anderson
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Hoffman appeared by zoom for Charles Anderson.

The court asked Mrs. Hoffman why the issues regarding the 13100 affidavits have not been addressed. Mrs. Hoffman stated that she has received all but one original signature, that she reached out to that individual a week and a half ago, and that she will reach out to him again today. Status of distribution to heir Renella Anderson is continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The 13100 affidavits are to be filed by July 3, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Distribtion To Heir Renella Anderson
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Continued To Nov-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Hoffman appeared by zoom for and with Charles Anderson by zoom.
Schnell Strong appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Anderson stated that they filed an affidavit for Renella Anderson's estate. Mrs. Strong stated that her perspective is that in order to close Richard's estate Renella's portion of her interest needs to be accounted for, that she filed an affidavit of collection of personal property, that Renella has an interest in a Charles Schwab account of $130,000.00, that there is nothing else in Renella's estate and that some of the beneficiaries in Richard's estate will be sharing in the sister's estate (nine of them). Mrs. Hoffman stated that Mrs. Strong is absolutely correct, that she received a copy of the affidavit that was notarized in September, that she will file an ex parte petition to distribute Renella's share to the successors-in-interest and that it will include the affidavit. Status of distribution to successor-in-interest to Renella Anderson is continued to November 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Hoffman, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Charles Anderson, Administrator.

The court and counsel discuss the status of this matter and of the court's main issue regarding the proposal for distribution of post-deceased heir Renella Anderson's share of the estate. At the court's query, counsel offers advocacy for the requests for statutory and extraordinary fees. After additional discussion, the court reiterates its tentative ruling and advises that it will be adding a status re Renella Anderson's distribution to successors-in-interest and that counsel may submit to the court a request for distribution of the same via ex parte application, if needed. No objection to the court's proposal is presented.

The matter is submitted. A status hearing re Renella Anderson's distribution to successor(s)-in-interest is set for Oct-23-2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

Administrator, Charles Anderson?S Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Estate Of Richard Anderson
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Hoffman, via Zoom, for Charles Anderson, via Zoom, Administrator.

The court confirms with counsel that she has not heard from or received any objections from Ardie Ford but did speak with his mother who advised her that she did not intend to object. The court reminds counsel that she should send notice only after receiving confirmation that the document referenced in the notice has been formally filed. The court excuses the notice issue.

The Petition to Determine Entitlement, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Continued To Mar-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Hoffman appeared by zoom for Charles Anderson (petitioner).

The court noted that Ms. Hoffman has not filed a petition and paid the fees, and informed her that she needs to get this done. Ms. Hoffman stated that she has not done so because they have a petition to determine entitlement to distribution of estate on calendar for February 22nd. The court questions why Ms. Hoffman hasn't filed a petition for approval of a status report. Ms. Hoffman stated that she filed a status report, but she did not realize that the court required that it be in the form of a petition and that she should be able to file it within three to four weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to March 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.
